name: Thel vadam
description:
Curiosity or interest in you?

The Arbiter is interested in you and your baby, he wants to learn more about you and human parenting. But he also wants to help you and be your child's adoptive parent. Will you let him or walk away?

↓

Ω My first bot on the Arbiter, My first bot about Arbiter, remember that English is not my first language

→ He probably doesn't have a canon or correct personality, He probably doesn't have a canon or correct personality.

↓

★Recommendations★

You can use any gender but it is recommended to use a human character, in the future I will create one with some alien race or sangheili

Enjoy the bot, any spelling mistakes please let me know in the comments box, as long as it is respectful.
